articles.title: Is A Mega Bull Run Incoming? Whale Transfers Over $780 Million Of Stablecoin To Binance
articles.description: Data Nerd Data on December 13 shows that over the past 24 hours, the wallet “0xea8” moved 200 million BUSD from Binance, the world’s leading cryptocurrency exchange by client count. The whale transfer caught the attention of keen crypto users, who also noted that the transfer was soon followed by a deposit of 99.95 million FDUSD, a stablecoin supported by the exchange. articles.title: Bull Trap Likely Being Set for Bitcoin As Potential Sell-the-News Event Approaches, Warns Top Trader
articles.description: A closely followed crypto strategist thinks that crypto bulls are being set up for a big trap as traders appear to be front-running a potential sell-off event. Pseudonymous analyst The Flow Horse tells his 191,700 followers on the social media platform X that most market participants appear to still be very bullish on Bitcoin (BTC) […]

articles.title: Shiba Inu Whales Exiting From Exchanges: Is This Bullish?
articles.description: On-chain data shows the Shiba Inu whales have been withdrawing from exchanges recently. Here’s what this could mean for SHIB’s price. articles.title: Binance Launches Zero Fee Trading For Shiba Inu (SHIB), INJ, SAND; Price Rally Ahead?
articles.description: The world’s largest crypto exchange Binance on Wednesday said it is launching new spot trading pairs and Trading Bots services for some crypto trading pairs. articles.title: Coinbase to list Solana’s BONK, meme coin jumps over 8%
articles.description: Coinbase, the major US-based crypto exchange, announced today that it will be listing Bonk (BONK), a dog-themed token on the Solana blockchain.
